description: Expanded FRS library for Pre-vacuum Steam Sterilizer mapped to URS chain and testability.

functions.title: Recipe and setpoint governance
functions.functionalRequirement: System provides controlled cycle recipes with approved setpoints and protected change control.

functions.title: Real-time CPP monitoring
functions.functionalRequirement: System continuously measures and records CPP data for each cycle stage.

functions.title: Alarm and interlock logic
functions.functionalRequirement: System detects out-of-limit conditions, annunciates alarms, and enforces interlocks.

functions.title: Utility verification before cycle start
functions.functionalRequirement: System verifies steam, power, and utility preconditions before cycle execution.

functions.title: Steam quality condition checks
functions.functionalRequirement: System supports steam quality and condensate assessment workflow.

functions.title: Sensor calibration status management
functions.functionalRequirement: System and procedures identify active sensor calibration status and expiry.

functions.title: Electronic records and audit trail
functions.functionalRequirement: System maintains attributable and tamper-evident records with complete audit trail.

functions.title: Export, print, and archive integrity
functions.functionalRequirement: System exports structured cycle data and ensures report parity and archive integrity.

functions.title: Load performance execution
functions.functionalRequirement: System executes representative and worst-case loads while maintaining CPP control.

functions.title: BI workflow support
functions.functionalRequirement: Process supports BI placement, incubation, chain-of-custody, and result capture templates.

functions.title: Bowie-Dick and vacuum/leak verification support
functions.functionalRequirement: Process supports routine and qualification-level air removal and vacuum/leak verification.

functions.title: Temperature mapping workflow support
functions.functionalRequirement: Process provides structured mapping planning, data capture, and report traceability.

functions.title: Lifecycle documentation traceability
functions.functionalRequirement: System supports FAT/SAT, spares, SOP, and qualification evidence traceability.
